summary: Iteration 7 testing: Pending Only filter (4th toggle button) and CSV export column fix ('modal' -> 'model'). All 11 backend tests pass, all 13 frontend feature requirements verified. Both new features fully working.

features_verified.filter_row_has_4_buttons: ✅ 'All Computers', 'In Stock Only', 'Pending Only', 'Sold Only' visible in correct order
features_verified.pending_button_aria_pressed: ✅ Clicking 'Pending Only' sets aria-pressed=true; All/InStock/Sold set to false
features_verified.pending_shows_pending_review: ✅ TEST-PEND-REVIEW-001 (Pending Review) visible when Pending Only active
features_verified.pending_shows_pending_delivery: ✅ TEST-PEND-DELIVERY-001 (Pending Delivery) visible when Pending Only active
features_verified.pending_hides_in_stock: ✅ TEST-BATCH-001 and UI-FORM-SAVE-001 (In Stock) hidden with Pending Only filter
features_verified.stats_bar_pending_only: ✅ Total=2, InStock=0, Pending=2, DonatedSold=0 when Pending Only active
features_verified.sr_announcement_pending: ✅ SR region announces '2 records shown. Filtered by status: Pending.'
features_verified.csv_header_model_not_modal: ✅ CSV header has 'model' at position 28 (not 'modal') - HEADER_LABELS fix working
features_verified.csv_data_values_correct: ✅ HP/EliteBook 840, Dell/Latitude 5490, Lenovo/ThinkPad T480, Acer/Aspire 5 all correct
features_verified.pending_plus_date_range: ✅ Pending (01/15-01/16 date range) shows 1 record (TEST-PEND-REVIEW-001 only)
features_verified.pending_plus_search: ✅ Pending + search 'Lenovo' shows 1 record; SR: 'Search complete, 1 result found for "Lenovo". Filtered by status: Pending.'

seed_data_creation: Created TEST-PEND-REVIEW-001 (Lenovo/ThinkPad T480/Pending Review/01-15-2025) and TEST-PEND-DELIVERY-001 (Acer/Aspire 5/Pending Delivery/01-20-2025) for frontend testing; both cleaned up after test completion. Existing records UI-FORM-SAVE-001 (Dell/Latitude 5490/In Stock) and TEST-BATCH-001 (HP/EliteBook 840/In Stock) unchanged.
critical_code_review_comments: HEADER_LABELS = {'modal': 'model'} correctly renames only the 'modal' field in the CSV header while data still reads from c.modal - this is the minimal change approach and works correctly.

Note: Backend /api/export/csv still uses 'modal' in fieldnames (not renamed). Only the frontend client-side export (handleExport) uses the HEADER_LABELS fix. Both are correct for their respective purposes.
The FILTER_OPTIONS order in code: All -> In Stock -> Pending -> Sold. This matches the UI render order confirmed in tests.
matchesFilter: statusFilter === 'Pending' triggers (c.inventory_status === 'Pending Review' || c.inventory_status === 'Pending Delivery') - correctly handles both pending variants.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 all features verified: (1) Pending Only filter: 4th toggle button between 'In Stock Only' and 'Sold Only'. Uses state value 'Pending' which maps to inventory_status IN ('Pending Review', 'Pending Delivery'). data-testid='filter-pending'. (2) CSV export: frontend handleExport uses HEADER_LABELS={'modal':'model'} so CSV header shows 'model' not 'modal'. Backend /api/export/csv still has 'modal' (unchanged). Data rows read from c.modal field. Existing test records: UI-FORM-SAVE-001 (Dell/Latitude 5490), TEST-BATCH-001 (HP/EliteBook 840). Admin: admin/Admin@12345.
